posts.author: Markkemal (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Search window for duplicates must be enlarged.. difficulty to compare in a first look..

What are you trying to achieve

when I search the duplicates in a board, the results and merge window is too small. so i can not compare the duplicates in first look, i have to move the item right or left shift. this is a real time consuming issue. if we can make the frame/window larger all user can easily decide to merge the items
